Everything you need

All-in-one Super App for Crypto!

Sharpe AI offers deep data intelligence, advanced trading, sophisticated DeFi execution, bridging, onramping, NFT trading, and much more in a comprehensive crypto super app.

Deep Data Intelligence:
The most comprehensive data platform in crypto, offering advanced insights into futures, options, NFTs, funding rates, governance, news, indices, and much more.
Sharpe Perp DEX:
The ultimate perpetual DEX with a lightning-fast matching engine, deep omnichain liquidity, superior pricing, and fully on-chain, non-custodial trading.
Sharpe Bridge:
An advanced cross-chain swap platform, powered by Li.FI. Access 30+ DEXs and 20+ chains, with advanced swap routing, transparent fees, and live quotes.
Sharpe DEX:
DEX meta-aggregator offering seamless trading across 22 chains and over 2000 coins. With advanced order types and integration with major aggregators for unmatched trading UX.
Sharpe Refuel and Sharpe Onramp:
Improved services designed to streamline user experience, ensuring users can manage all their needs on one platform without the hassle of switching between different services.
Sharpe NFT Marketplace:
NFT marketplace aggregator interface designed for professional traders. As a meta aggregator, it brings together the top NFT marketplaces, offering a seamless trading experience.

Exchange integrations

Sharpe integrates leading cryptocurrency CEXs and DEXs to provide granular data and in-depth intelligence for traders wanting to gain unfair competitive edge.

Frequently asked questions

Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to us on Discord team.

Why does Sharpe exist?
Sharpe AI aims to be the de facto interaction layer for crypto, offering an all-in-one, AI-powered platform for DeFi management, trading, and market intelligence.
How do I earn Sharpe Points?
Sharpe Points can be earned by interacting with Sharpe’s products, such as trading perpetual swaps, swapping assets, bridging funds, and more. Here are more details.
How does Sharpe use AI?
Sharpe builds specialised NLP-based large-scale language models to power its terminal. SharpeGPT is not one but a set of hyper-small LLMs built for specific use cases such as sentiment analysis, predicting trends, or building optimal DeFi strategies.
Who’s behind the project?
Our team comes from a strong background in quantitative finance, natural language processing, and technology, having built and scaled successful products.
